lines.speaker: Ali the Tea Seller
lines.text: Welcome! I'm Ali, and this is my tea shop! Is there anything I can do for you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well you never actually made me that tea...

lines.speaker: Ali the Tea Seller
lines.text: Ah yes! I'll get the water boiling at once. Is there anything else I can do for you while you wait?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Ali the Tea Seller
lines.text: Welcome! I'm Ali, and this is my tea shop! Is there anything I can do for you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... Could I get some tea?

lines.speaker: Ali the Tea Seller
lines.text: Of course! I'll get the water boiling at once. Is there anything else I can do for you while you wait?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's the tea coming along?

lines.speaker: Ali the Tea Seller
lines.text: Oh! Yes, the water is boiling. Just give me a minute!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm so thirsty.

lines.speaker: Ali the Tea Seller
lines.text: I know, the desert is forever hot. Thirsty work here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's business here? Seems quite out the way.

lines.speaker: Ali the Tea Seller
lines.text: Hmm...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not good?

lines.speaker: Ali the Tea Seller
lines.text: It's not that. It's just that I've been having issues with a few thieves lately. Four to be precise!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They've been stealing your tea?

lines.speaker: Ali the Tea Seller
lines.text: There have been a few break-ins. A recent shipment from Karamja has been taken! That was some of the finest stuff I've ever managed to get my hands on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's awful. If I see any shifty characters, I'll be sure to teach them a lesson.

lines.speaker: Ali the Tea Seller
lines.text: Ha! Very courageous, adventurer! These thieves are big and brutish. I wouldn't start something you may not be able to finish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm pretty tough. I think I can handle them.

lines.speaker: Ali the Tea Seller
lines.text: If you say so.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd best be heading off.

lines.speaker: Ali the Tea Seller
lines.text: You're leaving? But the tea is almost done!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've been waiting quite a while. Perhaps another time.
